zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Yonge於大約1322年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可希頓時，他的父親Philip le Yonge29歲，母親Cecilia de Ipstones30歲。他於1347年與Isold Hawberke在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1389年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Yonge于大约1322年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可希頓时，他的父亲Philip le Yonge29岁，母亲Cecilia de Ipstones30岁。他于1347年与Isold Hawberke在英国英格兰素福爾可霍普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1389年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yonge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   De Jonge  , a variant of   De Jong  .

variants.name: De Jonge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Adriaan, Frans, Geert, Hendrik, Jacobus, Joop, Marinus, Marten, Maurits, Nicolaas, Pieter.  German Erna, Hans, Kurt.
Dutch and Flemish: variant of   De Jong  . This surname is also found in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Yonge was born about 1322, in Sibton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip le Yonge, was 29 and his mother, Cecilia de Ipstones, was 30. He married Isold Hawberke in 1347, in Hopton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1389, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Yonge est né environ 1322, à Sibton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip le Yonge, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cecilia de Ipstones, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isold Hawberke en 1347, à Hopton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1389, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Yonge um 1322 in Sibton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip le Yonge 29 und seine Mutter Cecilia de Ipstones 30. Er hat 1347 in Hopton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Isold Hawberke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1389 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

Lui sposato Isold Hawberke nel 1347, nel Hopton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1389, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Yongeが約1322年にイギリスイギリススフォルクシブトンで生まれた時，父Philip le Yongeは29歳，母Cecilia de Ipstonesは30歳であった。1347年にイギリスイギリススフォルクホープトンでIsold Hawberkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1389年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Yonge(이)가 대략 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 시브턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip le Yonge(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia de Ipstones(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홉턴에서 Isold Hawberke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1389년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Yonge родился около 1322 г. в местности сибтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Philip le Yonge было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de Ipstones, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isold Hawberke в 1347 г. в местности хоптон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1389 г. в возрасте 69 лет.
